title: Robert Cass
compiled_truth: Robert Cass is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-11-24 to 2001-06-07), Robert Cass sent 23 and received 241 emails, totalling 264 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (18), [Melba Lozano](people/melba-lozano) (15), [Kevin Meredith](people/kevin-meredith) (13), [Jeff Blumenthal](people/jeff-blumenthal) (9), [Bjorn Hagelmann](people/bjorn-hagelmann) (9).
